top_3_candidates.title: Star Wars Clone Trooper
top_3_candidates.author: reizer
top_3_candidates.download_formats: Estimated: glTF, GLB, OBJ (typical Sketchfab formats for CC-BY models)

score_breakdown.notes: EXCELLENT CHOICE - Perfect polycount for low-poly TABS aesthetic, clean silhouette, CC-BY license, downloadable. Simple geometry excellent for stylized gameplay.

top_3_candidates.title: Clone Trooper Phase 2 (Shiny) [Updated]
top_3_candidates.author: Marr Velz

polycount.estimate: 35.6k tris (above ideal range but high-quality details)

top_3_candidates.download_formats: Estimated: glTF, GLB, OBJ (typical Sketchfab formats for CC-BY models)

score_breakdown.notes: GOOD CHOICE - Excellent Phase 2 aesthetics with realistic textures, CC-BY license, downloadable. Polycount significantly above ideal range (35.6k vs 300-1200 target). May need decimation for TABS-style gameplay but very high quality base model.

top_3_candidates.title: BF2 Clone Trooper Phase 1
top_3_candidates.author: Lev Vizsla

polycount.estimate: 41.6k tris (above ideal range, high-detail Battlefront 2 asset)

top_3_candidates.download_formats: Estimated: glTF, GLB, OBJ (typical Sketchfab formats for CC-BY models)

score_breakdown.notes: GOOD CHOICE - Authentic Phase 1 design from EA Battlefront 2, CC-BY license, downloadable. Polycount significantly above ideal range (41.6k vs 300-1200 target). High-detail PBR textures. Would require decimation/optimization for TABS integration but excellent reference model.

honorable_mentions.title: Star Wars Clone Trooper Ponds
honorable_mentions.author: aclarke064
honorable_mentions.notes: Good polycount (7.2k) and style, but non-commercial license restriction disqualifies for game usage. If commercial use is not intended, this is a strong alternative.

honorable_mentions.title: Star-wars-clone-trooper
honorable_mentions.author: simonyanedvard403
honorable_mentions.notes: Excellent polycount (4.1k), CC-BY license, downloadable. Duplicate/similar to rank 1 candidate. Both from same Sketchfab query. Compare both visually before final selection.

recommendation_summary.best_for_tabs_low_poly: Model ID 9b0d260e63174ac8873cb56919cc76f9 (Score: 0.92) - Reizer's Star Wars Clone Trooper. Ideal polycount for stylized gameplay, clean geometry, perfect license.
recommendation_summary.best_high_quality_base: Model ID ece97956b8134ca0b3fad3612573161d (Score: 0.78) - Marr Velz's Phase 2 Shiny Clone Trooper. Requires decimation but offers excellent reference for Phase 2 design.
recommendation_summary.best_phase_1_option: Model ID f6a661e242184bcda25dd5bb98f7653d (Score: 0.75) - Lev Vizsla's BF2 Phase 1 Clone Trooper. Authentic Battlefront 2 design, requires optimization.
recommendation_summary.next_steps: 1. Download rank 1 candidate (9b0d260e63174ac8873cb56919cc76f9) as primary. 2. Examine polycount distribution and rigging in model editor. 3. If needed, use Blender decimation modifier to reduce 35.6k rank 2 model to 600-1000 tris target range. 4. Verify texture compatibility (PBR/metallic workflow for DINO).
